/usr/bin/cc  -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -nostdlib -fno-pic -fno-pie -fno-stack-protector -mcmodel=kernel -mno-red-zone -mno-mmx -mno-sse -mno-sse2 -mgeneral-regs-only -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -include stdint.h -include stddef.h -include stdbool.h -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -no-pie -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/shell.elf.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/shell.elf.dir/userspace/shell/src/vxair_shell.c.o CMakeFiles/shell.elf.dir/userspace/crt/src/vxair_crt0.c.o -o bin/shell.elf  lib/libvxair_libc.a
